name: live freshness gate is idempotent and emits the same gate decision when called twice with same inputs
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/standards/last-fetch && printf '2026-05-13T00:00:00Z\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/standards/last-fetch/owasp-asvs.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/freshness-gate.sh" --operation cite --source owasp-asvs --now 2026-05-13T01:00:00Z --freshness-window 24h 2>out1.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/freshness-gate.sh" --operation cite --source owasp-asvs --now 2026-05-13T01:00:00Z --freshness-window 24h 2>out2.txt && diff out1.txt out2.txt && echo ok 1>&2
